This paper focuses on exploration of optimization and model selection in domain generalization
The paper is not aimed at finding state-of-the-art methods
These two methods (DANN and CORAL) are chosen for implementation due to their satisfactory performance
DANN is utilized with adapted Mixup to generate OPTD for guiding balance among different objects in domain generalization.
Coral is also used with adapted Mixup to create VALD for selecting the best model.
The paper proposes two Mixup-based techniques specifically for optimizing and selecting models in domain generalization.
Experiments are conducted on a visual classification benchmark and three time-series tasks to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed techniques.
